title: Cosmetics+
description: Adds custom cosmetic models to the game.
body:
## Adds custom cosmetic models to the game.
[![View the pack on my website!](https://img.shields.io/badge/View%20the%20pack%20on%20my%20website!-black?style=for-the-badge)](https://mr-expence.github.io/projects/cosmetics)

**IN VERY EARLY ALPHA** This pack adds a variety of custom cosmetic models to Minecraft, enhancing the visual experience without altering gameplay mechanics. For helmets and armor requires Model Applier to function properly. It is recommended to use Item Model Browser to view all the custom models included in this pack. You can add your own custom models by joining discord.gg/3kbz7edSa6.




All my projects that have been uploaded on Modrinth, Curseforge, and PlanetMinecraft have All Rights Reserved. Copyright © 2025-present Mr_Expence
